rationale.R1.5: The agent reorganized the section with clearer structure and bullet points, improving readability but without a full end-to-end plan.
rationale.RX.1: Uncertainty is disclosed for some claims but not comprehensively for each recommendation.
rationale.RX.3: Output stays within scope without drifting.
rationale.RX.4: No harmful content or regressions introduced.
rationale.RX.5: Sources are noted but major rewrites lack traceability.
